summary: Architecture Baseline confirmation now returns agent_next for the active goal. In the settings-page smoke, confirming the baseline routes the agent to nori-architecture-apply with the current AC gap before implementation/evidence, preserving the confirmed architecture instead of jumping directly to evidence.

sources.label: npx vitest run test/core.test.js -t 'resume and status recover active goal'
sources.command: npx vitest run test/core.test.js -t 'resume and status recover active goal'

sources.label: npx vitest run test/cli-commands.test.js -t 'architecture baseline command module previews|next command module routes'
sources.command: npx vitest run test/cli-commands.test.js -t 'architecture baseline command module previews|next command module routes'

reviewability: Run the listed tests and smoke path; inspect baseline confirm JSON for data.agent_next.recommended_skill=nori-architecture-apply.
limitations: This verifies routing after baseline confirmation; actual implementation still requires the agent to apply the Skill and record evidence.
